commit.message:
Release/v0.2.0 ready (#3)

* fix: resolve eslint require() errors and format code

* 0.2.1

* Rewrote the Proxy/MCP runner to intercept the Agent's  (requests) rather than just monitoring the Server's  (responses). Dangerous actions are now caught _before_ they reach the target server.

* fix: resolve browser approval race, undo engine correctness, and UI init crash

- Race condition: autoStartDaemonAndWait now verifies HTTP readiness via
  GET /settings before returning true, preventing stale-PID false positives
- Race condition: openBrowserLocal() called immediately after daemon is
  HTTP-ready so browser starts loading before POST /check fires, ensuring
  the SSE 'add' event is delivered to an already-connected client
- Race condition: daemon skips openBrowser() when autoStarted=true to
  avoid duplicate tabs (CLI already opened the browser)
- Race condition: 'Abandoned' browser racer result now resolves the race
  as denied instead of being silently swallowed (caused CLI to hang)
- Race condition: SSE reconnect abandon timer raised 2s→10s so a page
  reload doesn't abandon pending requests before the browser reconnects
- Bug fix: cloudBadge null check in SSE 'init' handler — missing DOM
  element crashed the handler before addCard() ran, causing approval
  requests to never appear when browser was cold-started
- Undo engine: moved snapshot trigger from PostToolUse (log) to
  PreToolUse (check) so snapshot captures state before AI change, not
  after (previous timing made undo a no-op)
- Undo engine: applyUndo now deletes files created after the snapshot
  that git restore alone does not remove
- Undo engine: expanded STATE_CHANGING_TOOLS list to include
  str_replace_based_edit_tool and create_file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: fix prettier formatting in undo.ts

* fix: applyUndo now deletes untracked files absent from snapshot

Previously only tracked files (git ls-files) were checked for deletion,
so files created after the snapshot but never committed (e.g. test.txt)
survived the undo. Now also queries git ls-files --others --exclude-standard
to catch untracked non-ignored files — the same set git add -A captures
when building the snapshot tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: report local approval/deny back to SaaS to clear PENDING status

When a local channel (native popup, browser dashboard, terminal) wins
the approval race while cloud is also enforced, the pending SaaS request
was never resolved — leaving Mission Control stuck on PENDING forever.

Now finish() calls resolveNode9SaaS() (PATCH /intercept/requests/:id)
whenever checkedBy !== 'cloud' and a cloudRequestId exists, closing the
request immediately with the correct APPROVED/DENIED status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: cloud audit, config merge fixes, and agentVersion client tracking

core.ts:
- Fire-and-forget POST /intercept/audit for all local fast-path allows
  (ignoredTools, sandboxPaths, local-policy, trust) — gives org admins
  full visibility of calls that never reached the cloud
- Fixed config merge: sandboxPaths and ignoredTools now concatenate across
  layers (global → project → local); dangerousWords replaces (higher wins)
- agentVersion context now sent as context.agent so backend can store AI
  client type (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Terminal) separately from machine identity

cli.ts:
- Updated context payload to include agent type metadata for accurate
  per-client breakdown in Mission Control Agents tab

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: nadav <isr.nadav@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix napari vispy KeyError: re-register layers with missing visuals

Root cause: layers added during deferred viewer setup weren't always
registered in napari's vispy canvas layer_to_visual mapping. Setting
layer.visible then caused KeyError in _reorder_layers_in_the_same_view.

Fix:
- Added ensure_layers_registered() to ChamberVisualizationManager that
  detects layers missing from vispy canvas and re-adds them
- Called before _update_visualization and _update_channel_availability
- Wrapped all layer.visible assignments in try/except to prevent cascade
  failures (one broken layer shouldn't block others)
- Per-channel try/except in _update_visualization so one channel error
  doesn't prevent other channels from displaying

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Wire SecretScrubber into memory save, audit log, and conversation storage

SecretScrubber is now used at three persistence boundaries:
- memory_save tool scrubs content before writing to vector store
- audit logger scrubs field values before writing JSON Lines
- conversation store scrubs message content before SQLite insert

Each scrub triggers an audit event (secret_scrubbed) so there is a
record of redaction. Scrubber and notification callback are threaded
from main.go through the tool dispatcher and storage layer.

commit.message:
feat: Relationship Raid Boss, CV Skill Tree, Dobbie NPC System

- Relationship Raid Boss (Co-op Quests):
  QuestCard now shows a pink 💞 Raid HP bar for relationship-coop quests,
  depleting as partners complete their part (mirrors boss HP bar pattern).
  Partners shown as ○ unclaimed / ⚔ claimed / ✓ done with live counter.

- CV Builder — Skill Tree Progress:
  Skills now display as leveled cards (🌱 Novice → 📗 Apprentice → ⚔ Skilled → 👑 Expert)
  based on completion count (1 / 3 / 6 / 10+), with a progress bar to next tier
  and "N more to [tier]" hint. Replaces flat chip list.

- NPC System — Dobbie als Quest Giver:
  Dobbie panel now shows a rotating mood (😸 Content / 😾 Demanding / 😤 Annoyed /
  😻 Affectionate / 🙄 Unimpressed) cycling every 4 hours with a flavor quote.
  Added "npc-dobbie" as alias in NPC_CONFIG (page.tsx) and NPC_META (server.js)
  so quests with createdBy:"npc-dobbie" also render the 🐱 pink badge.

commit.message:
Add error handling to v4/verify POST handler (#1824)

* Add error handling to v4/verify POST handler

Wrap the entire handler in try-catch blocks to catch and log Hasura
GraphQL errors that were previously causing unlogged 500 errors. This
enables visibility into verification failures due to Hasura timeouts,
connection issues, or other transient errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Use return await to ensure async rejections are caught

Without await, rejected promises from handleSessionProofVerification
and handleUniquenessProofVerification bypass the try-catch block,
causing unlogged 500 errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: Ticker-Banner als echte Endlosschleife — rAF-basiert, pixelgenau, lueckenlos

Alte Probleme: CSS translateX(-50%) ungenau (Whitespace-Gap zwischen inline-block Spans),
nur 2 Content-Kopien (Luecke bei kurzen Inhalten auf breiten Displays).

Neuer Ansatz:
- requestAnimationFrame mit translate3d fuer GPU-beschleunigtes, pixelgenaues Scrolling
- useLayoutEffect misst exakte Content-Breite (getBoundingClientRect)
- Dynamische Kopienanzahl: Math.ceil(containerWidth / contentWidth) + 1
- Modulo-Wrap bei exakt einer Content-Breite = nahtloser Uebergang
- flex statt inline-block eliminiert HTML-Whitespace-Luecken
- ResizeObserver reagiert auf Container-Groessenaenderungen
- prefers-reduced-motion wird respektiert
- Ungenutztes CSS entfernt: @keyframes ticker-scroll, @utility animate-ticker-scroll

commit.message:
Add live search status to public site via Supabase SearchStatus table

- _push_search_status() in searcher.py: throttled UPSERT to SearchStatus
  (once per 15s during active search, always on start/stop)
- Wired into write_status(), record_search_start(), clear_status()
- Public site polls SearchStatus every 10s using anon key
- Panel auto-shows when search is running with type, progress, log lines
- Panel hides when no search is active

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: configure Gemini model and thinking budget via env vars (#75)

GEMINI_MODEL defaults to gemini-2.5-flash.
GEMINI_THINKING_BUDGET defaults to 512 tokens.
Both can be overridden in Vercel environment settings without redeploying.

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

style: Redesign tab bar from navy pills to underline style (#99)

* style: Redesign tab bar from navy pills to underline style

Adopt Shadcn v4's official variant="line" pattern for TabsList.
Replace heavy bg-primary (#213350) navy container with clean
underline-style tabs matching Linear, Notion, and GitHub Primer.

tabs.tsx changes:
- Add cva with default (pill on bg-muted) and line (underline) variants
- TabsList accepts variant prop, exposes via data-variant attribute
- TabsTrigger uses group-data-[variant=...] for variant-aware styling
- Line variant uses after: pseudo-element for active underline indicator
- Default variant updated from navy bg-primary to subtle bg-muted
- Export tabsListVariants for external use

Consumer migrations (9 files, all to variant="line"):
- employee-detail-content (9 tabs with status dots)
- profile-page-content (4 tabs)
- leave-dashboard-content (4 tabs with count badge)
- absence-dashboard-content (2 tabs)
- flexible-working-dashboard (3 tabs with Badge counts)
- leaving-dashboard-content (3 tabs)
- working-location-content (outer tabs only — inner Month/Week
  stays default variant for visual hierarchy)
- learning/courses/page (4 tabs)
- learning/my-courses/page (3 tabs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: Update plan and lessons for accent contrast + tab redesign

- docs/plan.md: Mark table standardisation complete, add accent fix
  and tab redesign entries
- CLAUDE.md: Add 3 lessons (decouple accent/secondary, Shadcn v4
  line variant pattern, group class for group-data selectors)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* a11y: Use specific sr-only text for department action buttons

Screen reader users need to distinguish between action buttons for
different rows. Generic "Actions" text is insufficient — now reads
"Actions for {dept.name}". Updated tests to match new accessible names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: Add sr-only accessibility lesson to CLAUDE.md

Row action buttons should use specific sr-only text including the
entity name for screen reader users to distinguish between rows.
